items.requirement: People can create wallets through the RPC service without receiving secret material.

System architecture for runtime, RPC, wallets, bridge, backup, operations, verification, and fail-closed owner boundaries is explicit and evidence-backed.
Owner-operated public deployment contract is machine-checkable, has rollback commands, and fails closed until public RPC, backup, bridge, and tester sharing gates pass.
